metadata.description: Design Intelligence Framework — multi-agent design reasoning with 67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, 163 industry profiles, and W3C design token output.

plugins.name: forma
plugins.description: The AI skill that reasons before it designs. Forma makes AI coding assistants think like a design team — researching audience, applying industry constraints, generating design systems, building interfaces, then auditing their own work.
